symbols.name: applyWildBonus
symbols.detail: [DEAD] Exported but imported by 0 files | [UNIQUE] No similar functions found in codebase | [OK] Implementation exactly matches the documented formula `basePayout × (1 + wildCount) × 2^wildCount` from both `.anatoly/docs/02-Architecture/02-Core-Concepts.md` and `.anatoly/docs/03-Guides/02-Advanced-Configuration.md`. Verified against the lookup table: wildCount=1 → ×4, wildCount=2 → ×12, wildCount=3 → ×32 — all correct. Guard `wildCount <= 0` safely short-circuits to `basePayout`.

actions.description: Remove dead code: `applyWildBonus` is exported but unused
Add JSDoc documentation for exported symbol: `applyWildBonus`
